name: CEC - Búsqueda de paneles e inversores

parameters.query:
={{ $json.type === 'panel'
  ? `SELECT id, manufacturer, model, pmax_w, voc, isc, vmp, imp, efficiency, length_m, width_m, bifacial, raw
     FROM cec_panels
     WHERE manufacturer ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
        OR model        ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
     ORDER BY
       CASE WHEN manufacturer ILIKE $1 || '%' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
       manufacturer, model
     LIMIT ${$json.limit}`
  : `SELECT id, manufacturer, model, pac_w, vdc_min, vdc_max, mppt_count, phase, raw
     FROM cec_inverters
     WHERE manufacturer ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
        OR model        ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
     ORDER BY
       CASE WHEN manufacturer ILIKE $1 || '%' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
       manufacturer, model
     LIMIT ${$json.limit}` }}
